stemHtml: Based on regulation (EU) 965/2012, the LVO procedures which are to be set by the operator are…

options.a: Taxi, Approach, Landing, Missed approach procedure only.
options.b: Taxi, Take-off, Holding, Approach, Landing, Rollout, Missed approach procedure.
options.c: Take-off, Approach, Landing, Missed approach procedure only.
options.d: Taxi, Take-off, Approach, Flare, Landing, Rollout, Missed approach procedure.
